title: stevia salviifolia
intro: Stevia salviifolia, also known as Mexican stevia, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Stevia salviifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. The herbal preparations of Stevia salviifolia typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
